text: Aaj subah is private naukri se nikalne ka email aaya aur tabhi se mere seene mein ek bhayankar jakdan mehsus ho rahi hai jaise kisi ne bhari pahaad rakh diya ho. Kheti mein pehle hi karz chadh gaya tha aur ab is layoff ke baad mere dimaag ki nasen fatne ko ho rahi hain, saans lene mein itni takleef hai ki lagta hai dil abhi ruk jayega. Mere hath-pair thande pad gaye hain aur dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai.

Sarkari naukri ki umeed mein barson bitaye par aaj is startup ki naukri chhootne ki khabar milte hi mere poore badan mein ajeeb si thakan aur kapkapi shuru ho gayi hai. Sahukar ka karz aur ghar ki EMI sir par hai, aur is fikar mein mere pet mein aisi marod uthi hai ki main khet tak jaane ki himmat bhi nahi juta pa raha. Sar mein itna bhari dard hai ki lagta hai aankhon ke aage andhera chha jayega.

Email padh kar jabse pata chala hai ki kaam se nikal diya gaya hoon, mere kandhon aur peeth mein ek aisi aithan ho gayi hai ki hilna bhi mushkil ho gaya hai. Crop failure ki wajah se pehle hi dab gaya tha, ab is termination ke baad mere dimaag mein ek zor ki seeti baj rahi hai aur chehra bilkul sunn pad gaya hai. Pure jism mein ek aisi jalan phail rahi hai jaise andar hi andar koi bukhar chadh raha ho.

Subah se email dekhne ke baad mere gale mein ek ajeeb sa gola phans gaya hai aur meri aawaz bilkul baith gayi hai, na paani nigla ja raha hai na baat ho rahi hai. Gaon mein sabko lagta hai ki main shehar mein bada aadmi ban gaya hoon par is nakami ke baad mere ghutne dard se kaanp rahe hain. Dil itni zor se dhadak raha hai ki lagta hai seena cheer kar bahar aa jayega, aur mujhe lagatar ghabrahat mehsus ho rahi hai.

MNC se layoff ka mail padhte hi mere hatho ki ungliyan thar-tharane lagi hain aur dimaag mein ek aisi bhayankar thakan chha gayi hai ki main ek kadam bhi nahi chal pa raha. Kisan parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ke liye barson mehnat ki, par ab is khabar se mere pet mein aisi jalan aur aithan hai ki lag raha hai mera poora shareer collapse hone wala hai. Aankhon mein itni jalan hai aur sir itna bhari hai jaise kisi ne pathar se koot diya ho.
